---
pagetitle: "CV — Shih-Yang Lin"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.cv-head}
::: {}
::: {.eyebrow}
Curriculum Vitae
:::
# Shih-Yang Lin
:::
[↧ Download PDF](cv.pdf){.cv-download}
:::

## Appointments

::: {.entry}
[2025 –]{.year}
::: {}
[Assistant Professor, Department of Economics]{.role}<br>[National Dong Hwa University]{.org}
:::
:::

## Education

::: {.entry}
[2025]{.year}
::: {}
[Ph.D. in Economics]{.role}<br>[National Taiwan University]{.org}
:::
:::

::: {.entry}
[2016]{.year}
::: {}
[M.A. in Economics]{.role}<br>[National Taiwan University]{.org}
:::
:::

::: {.entry}
[2008]{.year}
::: {}
[B.A. in Political Economy]{.role}<br>[National Sun Yat-Sen University]{.org}
:::
:::

## Grants & Awards

::: {.entry}
[2025]{.year}
::: {}
Best Doctoral Dissertation Award (Sho-Chieh Tsiang Theoretical Economics), Taiwan Economic Association
:::
:::

::: {.entry}
[2023]{.year}
::: {}
Doctoral Dissertation Fellowship of the Humanities and Social Sciences, National Science and Technology Council
:::
:::

::: {.entry}
[2022]{.year}
::: {}
Asia Bank Scholarship, National Taiwan University
:::
:::

::: {.entry}
[2020]{.year}
::: {}
Liu Ta-Chung Scholarship, National Taiwan University
:::
:::

::: {.entry}
[2019]{.year}
::: {}
Harold H.C. Han Scholarship, National Taiwan University
:::
:::

::: {.entry}
[2018]{.year}
::: {}
Chu, Cyrus C. Y. and Chen, Tain-Jy Scholarship, National Taiwan University
:::
:::

## Selected Publications

1. U.S. Inflation Inequality between 2010 and 2023, *Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis Review* (2026).
2. Financial Frictions and Uncertainty Shocks, *Macroeconomic Dynamics* (2025).
3. Estimating the Willingness to Pay for Voting when Absentee Voting is not Allowed, *Social Science Quarterly* (2021).

[Full publication list →](research.qmd){.more}
